bio: I'm Rabin R, a Senior Frontend Angular Developer with 4+ years of experience engineering critical systems for government and enterprise clients — including immigration portals for Fiji and pension platforms serving thousands of users. I believe building products that scale requires discipline: strong type systems, accessible-first design, automated testing, and measurable outcomes.
signature: Engineer building products, not just features.

quote.text: Building products that scale requires discipline — not just shipping features.

journey.description: Began B.Sc. Information Technology at National College, Tiruchirappalli.
Graduated and specialized in modern frontend development & Angular.
Joined ITGalax — engineering government portals for 10,000+ users.
Led adoption of Angular Signals & standalone components across teams.
Consulting on AI/ML-driven analytics dashboards & open-source Angular tooling.
